title: A Resilient Crop for the Philippine Drylands
abstract:
The growing interest in pigeonpea by farming communities of the country
necessitates learning materials such as this bulletin, that encapsulates the
botanical attributes and socio-economic potential of the crop, including areas
to exploit for its commercialization. ICRISAT’s contribution in taking the
initiative for synthesizing the initial R&D work on pigeonpea in the Philippines
is a headstart for more comprehensive documentation. In the long run, it will
serve as an invaluable resource to create awareness and facilitate adoption
for greater impact.
